name: 183 Pawn Shop
description_short: 183 Pawn Shop is a pawn broker located in Fort Worth, TX offering collateral-based loans and pawn services at 6024 E Belknap St.
description_long:
183 Pawn Shop operates as a traditional pawn broker in Fort Worth, Texas, serving the local community with quick access to cash in exchange for personal items of value. Based on the available information from their Waze listing, the business maintains standard retail hours and operates from a physical storefront location on East Belknap Street. The company provides contact accessibility through phone at (817) 831-2594 for customer inquiries and transactions. Like most pawn operations, 183 Pawn Shop likely facilitates short-term loans secured by personal property, which allows customers to obtain immediate cash while retaining the option to reclaim their items upon repayment.

Pawn shops serve a specific consumer finance niche by offering collateral-based lending without credit checks or income verification requirements. Customers can bring items of value—typically jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, or other merchandise—and receive loans based on the assessed value of those items. 183 Pawn Shop operates during extended business hours six days per week, suggesting accessibility for working customers. The ability to reach them by phone indicates they offer consultation services for customers considering pawning items.

The primary distinguishing factor for 183 Pawn Shop is its location in Fort Worth and its established presence in the community, as evidenced by its Waze directory listing and assigned business coordinates. The shop maintains consistent operating hours Monday through Saturday (9 AM to 6 PM), providing reliable accessibility. Their phone availability suggests customer service responsiveness for inquiries before visiting the physical location.

Pawn shops like 183 Pawn Shop present a practical option for consumers needing immediate cash without credit evaluation, though this service comes with the inherent trade-off of surrendering personal property as collateral. The loan terms and interest rates—standard information for evaluating pawn services—are not disclosed in the available website content, limiting full assessment of value proposition. Customers should understand that pawning items differs fundamentally from traditional lending and involves risk of losing collateral if loans are not repaid.
address: 6024 E Belknap St, Fort Worth, TX 76117

pros: No credit check required to obtain a loan
Immediate cash access without lengthy application processes
Extended business hours (9 AM-6 PM) six days weekly for convenience
Phone contact line available for customer inquiries
Physical storefront location in Fort Worth with established business presence
Accessible collateral-based lending for consumers without traditional credit
No income verification required to qualify for a pawn loan
cons: Personal property must be surrendered as collateral with risk of permanent loss if loan is not repaid
Interest rates and loan terms not disclosed on available website materials
Limited information about pawn valuation methodology or appeal process
Only open Monday-Saturday; closed Sundays for customer access
High cost of borrowing typical in pawn industry compared to traditional loans
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash ($100-$5,000) without credit checks
People with poor or no credit history unable to access traditional loans
Individuals with items of value seeking short-term liquidity
Those who prefer tangible collateral-based lending over unsecured loans
diagnosis: 183 Pawn Shop is best suited for Fort Worth residents in temporary financial hardship who have items of value and cannot qualify for traditional credit-based loans. The main caveat is that pawning involves surrendering personal property as collateral with genuine risk of losing items permanently, and pawn loans are significantly more expensive than conventional lending—use only for short-term, small-dollar emergency needs.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property
